flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Post University fell 26% between 2021 and 2024 (45.3% → 33.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Post University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Post University rose 52% between 2021 and 2024 (14.7% → 22.3%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Post University rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 (20.4% → 24.9%).
